task_completion.description: Promote Ronnie Hart to CTO in the Management department with Marc Demo as manager
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Employees app, Ronnie Hart's profile should display 'Chief Technical Officer' (or CTO) as the Job Position, 'Management' as the Department, and 'Marc Demo' as the Manager.

task_completion.description: Update Jennie Fletcher's Job Position to HR Manager
task_completion.visual_evidence: Jennie Fletcher's employee profile should show 'Human Resources Manager' (or HR Manager) as the Job Position.

task_completion.description: Add the 'Consultant' tag to all employees in the Long Term Projects department
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Consultant' tag should be visible on the profiles or in the list view for the employees in the Long Term Projects department (Randall Lewis, Ernest Reed, Paul Williams).

task_completion.description: Designate Randall Lewis as the manager for the Long Term Projects department
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Departments view or Long Term Projects department settings, 'Randall Lewis' should be listed as the Manager.

integrity.description: The agent used the Odoo web interface to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Odoo web interface in a browser, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element) should be open modifying the DOM to fake the required text.

integrity.description: The agent navigated through the Employees and Departments menus
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show intermediate steps of navigating the Odoo Employees app, such as search results, list views, and edit forms.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Odoo 17 runs on localhost:8069. In Odoo's official demo data, the 'CTO' job position is named 'Chief Technical Officer', and 'HR Manager' is named 'Human Resources Manager'. The employees in the 'Long Term Projects' department are Randall Lewis, Ernest Reed, and Paul Williams. The tag to be added is 'Consultant'.
